results.error:
RuntimeError: ERROR: (gcloud.ml.speech.recognize) There was a problem refreshing your current auth tokens: Reauthentication failed. cannot prompt during non-interactive execution.
Please run:

  $ gcloud auth login

to obtain new credentials.

If you have already logged in with a different account, run:

  $ gcloud config set account ACCOUNT

to select an already authenticated account to use.
